description.value:
Send Medication prescription volgendeBeh-zorgaanb building blocks for patient C van de XXX_Voortman
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 3 VolgendeBehandelaar met Zorgaanbieder Medicatieafspraak met Zorgaanbieder als VolgendeBehandelaar gevuld. LET OP: Dit scenario staat los van scenario 3.7a t/m 3.7c.
Send Medication prescription volgendeBeh-zorgaanb resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '68519') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '117080') ))).count() = 1

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where((( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '68519') ) and ( (medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '117080') ))).count() = 1

description.value: Confirm that the request Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '68519|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.10' (AMOXICILLINE DISPERTABLET 500MG)
